system.requirement: If you are with your animal or beast companion...

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} your companion, or when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Siege} to calm or encourage it, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Journey} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition}, you may push your companion harder and add +1 (after rolling). If you do, make the @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d34cdf2408cd22b6]{Companion Takes a Hit} move (-1).

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +wits by sizing up a perilous situation from the saddle, you are one with your companion's instincts. Add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
